data.body: IMPLEMENTATION: 6/10 leaves committed (stack HEAD 7cd3a572e): ac0e, e1f2, 74d9, 24ec, f32e, a37b. All under proper discipline: docs leaves (ac0e/e1f2) direct; code leaves (74d9/24ec/f32e) via full held-out TDD (author RED happy+edge, hold out edges, subagent implements happy-only, validate restored oracle, teeth/mutation); a37b as a config-default flip (drift-refresh machinery pre-existed) with default-on behavioral + explicit-off back-out tests + doc sweep + measurement comment. 24ec's held-out oracle caught a REAL fail-closed bug (unguarded emit call-site). Each committed clean through pre-commit lint+typecheck. REMAINING (4 leaves): a8e5 (Pass-2 grounding hardening — big multi-component kernel: absence-claim veto verify.py/decide.py + DET hygiene det_floor + operator-attested workflow_ops), d4cf (G7 criterion — big: routing+require_parent_id overlay validator + AGENT rubric reading parent via show_ticket + coach move + plan-review.yaml), 9f25 (threshold derivation script over code_review_result_v1 sidecars + adjudication artifact + test), b9c0 (flip security criterion blocking at 9f25's derived threshold + 3 pinning tests + replay test — depends 9f25). THEN: push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, iterate LLM-Review+CI, close each leaf after Verified+1 (bottom-up), epic AC2 measurement-framework comment, close epic. Held-out edge tests archived at $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/heldout. Fully resumable.
